# GSTR-2B Reconciliation Tool

> Free online tool by TechBharat Studios to reconcile Tally or Purchase Register data with GSTR-2B downloaded from the GST portal. Auto-detects columns, matches invoices by GSTIN, and generates styled Excel reports — all processed in the browser.

## Pages

- [Home / Reconciliation Tool](/): Upload Tally and GSTR-2B Excel files, run smart invoice matching, view results, and download a color-coded reconciliation Excel report.
- [GST Reconciliation Guide](/guide/gst-reconciliation): What GST reconciliation is, why it matters for ITC, and step-by-step process.
- [GSTR-2B vs Tally](/guide/gstr-2b-vs-tally): Differences, common mismatch reasons, and recommended matching logic.
- [FAQ](/guide/faq): Common questions about GSTR-2B, ITC, file formats and data privacy.
- [Troubleshooting](/guide/troubleshooting): Fixes for common reconciliation mismatches and tool issues.
